summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lumo Entretenimiento landing page. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend mostly working with one minor modal overlay issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay prevents submit button clicks - DialogOverlay intercepts pointer events
ui_bugs.details: Form can be filled but submit button cannot be clicked due to modal overlay interception. Dropdown selections work fine.

passed_tests: Contact form API endpoints (all validation scenarios)
Artists section with Costel and Tenampa logos
Social media links (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issue in contact form - DialogOverlay is intercepting pointer events preventing submit button clicks. Consider adding force=True to click or adjusting z-index/overlay configuration.
